help.title: 🌸 AI Help Guide
help.how_to_chat:
### 💬 How to Chat with AI

**Three ways to talk to me:**
1. **DM me** - Just send me a direct message!
2. **@mention me** - Tag me in any channel: @Kythia hello!
3. **AI-enabled channels** - Admins can enable AI in specific channels with `/ai enable`

I remember our conversation context, so you can have natural back-and-forth discussions!
help.commands:
### 📋 Available Commands

**`/ai enable`** - Enable AI in current channel (Admin only)
**`/ai disable`** - Disable AI in current channel (Admin only)
**`/ai list`** - View all AI-enabled channels
**`/ai facts`** - See all facts I've learned about you
**`/ai fact-delete`** - Delete a specific fact by number
**`/ai forget`** - Clear conversation history
**`/ai personality`** - Change my conversation style
**`/ai help`** - Show this help guide
help.memory:
### 🧠 Memory & Facts System

I can remember facts about you! Just say:
• **"Remember that I like pizza"**
• **"Ingat aku suka coding"**
• **"Catat bahwa saya dari Jakarta"**

Supported languages: English, Indonesian

I categorize facts into types like:
• Birthday, Name, Hobbies
• Location, Job, Education
• Preferences (food, music, games, etc.)

View your facts with `/ai facts` anytime!
help.features:
### ✨ AI Features

**🖼️ Multi-Media Support**
• Send images - I can describe and analyze them
• Share videos - I can understand video content
• Upload PDFs - I can read documents
• Share YouTube links - I can discuss videos

**🛠️ Command Execution**
• Ask me to roll dice, check ping, play music
• I can execute bot commands for you!

**🌐 Web Search**
• Ask me current questions
• I can search the web for answers
help.tips:
### 💡 Tips & Tricks

✅ **Be conversational** - Talk to me naturally!
✅ **Use context** - I remember our previous messages
✅ **Ask follow-ups** - Continue the conversation
✅ **Share media** - I can see images and videos
✅ **Save facts** - Tell me things to remember

⚠️ **Privacy Notes:**
• Conversation history is cached for 30 minutes
• Facts are stored until you delete them
• Use `/ai forget` to clear history
• Use `/ai facts` to manage your data

fact_delete.no_facts: ❌ You don't have any saved facts to delete!
fact_delete.invalid_number: ❌ Invalid fact number! You only have {max} fact(s). Use `/ai facts` to see all your facts.

I'll now use the default personality set by the bot administrator.
